description: List of people receiving charitable support from the community. The list includes various people described as Rūmī (ie, from Byzantium). According to Goitein (Med Soc II, p. 445) the list is in the hand of Mūsā b. Abū l-Ḥayy. (Information from CUDL. See also Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימת אנשים המקבלים סיוע צדקה מהקהילה; כוללת אנשים שמתוארים כרומיים (מביזנטיון)
